/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/tcl-tk/lib -o libmidiplugin.dylib -install_name @rpath/libmidiplugin.dylib CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/midiplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/__/__/__/engine/src/qlcfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/__/__/interfaces/qlcioplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/configuremidiplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/mididevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/midiinputdevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/midioutputdevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/midiplugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/midiprotocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/__/common/miditemplate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/coremidienumerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/coremidiinputdevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/midiplugin.dir/coremidioutputdevice.cpp.o -iframework /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  -framework CoreFoundation -framework CoreMIDI /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
